title: Staffplugin
body:
#  Staff plugin for moderators and admins
StaffPlugin is a comprehensive tool designed specifically for server administration that enables effective player management and facilitates the enforcement of server rules. The plugin offers a set of functions that support the daily work of moderators and administrators, improving their visibility, speed of operation and the availability of key moderation tools.

Supported APIs: **EssentialsX, PlaceHolderAPI, Luckperms**

### Commands:

**/vanish** - Enable/disable vanish mode

**/gm <mode>** - Change game mode (0: Survival, 1: Creative, 2: Adventure, 3: Spectator)

**/fly** - Enable/disable flying mode

**/wielkichlop** - Turn on/off big boy mode (1.21+ only)

**/malychlop** - Turn on/off little boy mode (1.21+ only)

**/staffplugin help** - View help for the plugin

**/god** - Enable/Disable godmode

**/spawn** - Allows you to tp to spawn

**/setspawn** - allows you to set the spawn

**/speed (1-10)** - Change walking/flying speed

**/heal (player)** - Heals you or another player

**/freeze (player)** - Locks a player in place to check him out

**/tphere (player)** - Teleports the player to you

**/tp (player)** - Teleports you to the player

**/jqmessage** - Changes the default message when joining/leaving the server

**/ban (player) (reason)** - Ban player

**/tag <player> <tag/reset>** - Changes your tag above the head

**/silenttag <player> <tag/reset>** - allows you to set a tag without any information in the chat

**/rgbtag <player> <tag/reset>** - allows you to set a tag with a gradient (e.g. &#HEXCOLOR...) (1.16+)

**/tag2 <player> <tag/reset>** - allows you to set a suffix after the nickname

**/unban (player)** - Unban player

**/mute (player) (reason)** - mutes the player

**/tempmute (player) (time) (reason)** - muting a player for a specified period of time

**/tempban (player) (time) (reason)** - ban a player for a specified period of time

**/unmute (player)** - removes player mute


### Permissions:

**staff.jqmsg**

**staff.teleport.use**

**staff.freeze**

**staff.heal.use**

**staff.vanish.see**

**staff.vanish.use**

**staff.setspawn**

**staff.malychlop**

**staff.wielkichlop**

**staff.godmode**

**staff.speed.use**

**staff.tempmute**

**staff.unmute**

**staff.mute**

**staff.tempban**

**staff.unban**

**staff.settag**

**staff.ban**

**staff.tphere.use**

**staff.gm.use**

**staff.fly.use**

**staff.help.use**
